title: Underlying and extended data for: Increase of SARS-CoV-2 RNA load in faecal samples prompts for rethinking of SARS-CoV-2 biology and COVID-19 epidemiology.
author: Petrillo, Mauro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Underlying and extended data for: Increase of SARS-CoV-2 RNA load in faecal samples prompts for rethinking of SARS-CoV-2 biology and COVID-19 epidemiology. The dataset consists of two ZIP compressed files: 

 
	  UnderlyingData.zip  - Mass spectrometry file (one file in MGF format). 
	  ExtendedData.zip  - Supplementary material files (two files in PDF format).
steps_raw:
Underlying and extended data for: Increase of SARS-CoV-2 RNA load in faecal samples prompts for rethinking of SARS-CoV-2 biology and COVID-19 epidemiology. The dataset consists of two ZIP compressed files: 

 
	  UnderlyingData.zip  - Mass spectrometry file (one file in MGF format). 
	  ExtendedData.zip  - Supplementary material files (two files in PDF format).
